free_text: -Protons from the interaction of 14 MeV neutrons with
250 to 300 keV deuteron beam on zirconium
.Samples were in the form of metal strips, 1 cm wide
and from 5 to 12 mg/cm*2 thick. The samples were
placed at 90 degrees to the deuteron beam.
and direct contributions is by comparison of the
measured energy spectra with calculated energy
.Quoted values are the mean of several
independent measurements. Total error estimated as 20%
